summary: HandyHub marketplace app testing completed successfully. Backend APIs (95% pass rate) and Web Frontend both functional. Login, dashboard stats, services, profiles, and settings all working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns plain text instead of JSON, causing JSON decode error in tests

issues: Missing Google OAuth button in web app (exists in mobile app only)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update /health endpoint to return JSON instead of plain text
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend web app is simpler than mobile app - doesn't have executors list page, availability calendar, or portfolio management that mobile app has
The web app (React) and mobile app (Expo) share the same backend but have different feature sets
Web frontend apiClient.js line 98 has issue: updateProfile passes params instead of body - should use body for PUT request
seed_data_creation: Test created executor profile for provider with skills and hourly rate
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web frontend is simpler than mobile app. Key features to test: Login flow, Dashboard stats, Services CRUD, Admin settings. Mobile app has executors list, availability calendar, portfolio that web doesn't have.

auth./api/auth/login: PASS - Admin and provider login working

executors./api/executors: PASS - Returns list of providers with ratings

web_frontend.dashboard: PASS - Stats displayed correctly for admin
web_frontend.settings_tab: PASS - Admin settings with user management
